LAW AND MOTION 302, ATTORNEY, KEVIN CONLOGUE'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL AS TO PLAINTIFF SHEILA HARRIS IS GRANTED. MR. CONLOGUE WAIVES ALL LIENS. COUNSEL MUST PREPARE THE PROPOSED ORDER ON THE JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM, AND MUST INCLUDE THE PLAINTIFF'S CONTACT INFORMATION AND ALL FUTURE HEARING DATES. THE COURT DIRECTS PLAINTIFF SHEILA HARRIS TO THE MASTER CALENDAR DEPARTMENT, DEPT. 206, RE THE REQUEST FOR TRIAL CONTINUANCE. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR NO. 8189, EMAIL: CKAREN@SFTC.ORG; DEPT. 302.

Notice Of Plaintiff'S Motion To Continue Trial
Off Calendar Apr-13-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Feb-17-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Sheila Harris, Tel. 415.286.2652, for plaintiffs;
Kevin S. Conlogue, of Drake Law Firm, Tel. 213.381.1156, for plaintiffs, appearing via CourtCall.

Ruling: The matter was discussed. Attorney, Kevin Conlogue's Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel as to PLAINTIFF SHEILA HARRIS is granted. Mr. Conlogue waives all liens. Counsel must prepare the proposed order on the judicial council form, and must include the plaintiff's contact information and all future hearing dates. The Court directs plaintiff Sheila Harris to the Master Calendar Department, Dept. 206, re the request for trial continuance. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-29-2016 Set For Trial On May-01-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
